disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete inability to pass any urine for approximately two days, with an unbearable bursting fullness low in the abdomen
trigger_question_examples: When did you last manage to pass urine?
Are you able to pass any urine at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Not a drop for two days now. I feel like I'm going to burst — it's low down in my belly and it's unbearable.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive weak urinary stream and hesitancy developing over the past year
trigger_question_examples: Before these two days, how was your urine stream?
Have you had any trouble with passing urine over the last while?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For a good year now my stream's been getting weaker and it's been harder to get started, but I never had it checked.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep, unremitting aching lower back and pelvic pain over the past month, acutely worse tonight, with no relief from over-the-counter paracetamol
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the back pain — how long, and how bad?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep grinding ache in my low back and pelvis that's been there a month and it flared up terribly tonight. The chemist paracetamol does nothing at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about eight kilograms and marked loss of appetite over recent weeks
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
How has your appetite been lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've dropped about 8 kilos without trying and I've completely gone off my food these last few weeks.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both my legs and ankles have swollen up and gone puffy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently unable to stand or walk because of pain, lives alone with no one to help
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to move around at home?
Is anyone there with you tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't get up and walk for the pain, and I'm completely on my own here — there's nobody to help me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No current leg weakness or numbness and no loss of bowel control (screened negative at this contact)
trigger_question_examples: Are your legs weak or numb at all?
Have you had any loss of control of your bowels or a numb feeling around your bottom?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my legs still work and I haven't had any accidents or numbness down below — it's the pain that stops me moving, not weakness.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: Why are you asking me about my bowels? It's my waterworks and my back that are the problem.
